title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
summary: AI safety guardrails from OpenAI and Anthropic are restricting cybersecurity researchers' ability to develop and test security tools for finding vulnerabilities. While these safeguards aim to prevent misuse, they inadvertently limit legitimate defensive security research needed to identify and fix exploitable weaknesses.
content: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

zh.title: AI 安全防护措施如何阻碍了攻防安全研究人员的工作
zh.summary: 来自 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的 AI 安全防护措施限制了网络安全研究人员开发和测试安全工具来发现漏洞的能力。虽然这些安全措施旨在防止滥用，但它们无意中限制了识别和修复可利用漏洞所需的合法防御性安全研究。

title: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup
summary: TechCrunch is launching its Startup Battlefield competition in Australia in partnership with Stripe to identify and celebrate promising early-stage startups. The program will feature industry judges evaluating emerging companies across the Australian startup ecosystem.
content: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.

zh.title: 认识将决出澳大利亚下一个爆红初创公司的评委
zh.summary: TechCrunch 与 Stripe 合作在澳大利亚推出其初创公司竞技场竞赛，以发现和表彰有前景的早期创业公司。该计划将汇集行业评委，评估澳大利亚初创生态系统中的新兴公司。
